title: Find My Device -  Pin for headset location
scenario: Verify that the Find My Device pin display shows blue geo icons for connected headsets, gray for disconnected ones, and merges multiple devices at the same location into a numbered pin.
steps: Start the app with headset connected/disconnected.
Tap on Find My Device (allow GPS location if prompted).
Connect a second headset (or component) in the same location.
expected: Geo icon for connected headsets is blue, for disconnected ones is gray. If multiple devices are located in the same place, pins merge into one with a number.
